MULTIMADNESS-MALWARE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]
Shuffle a copy of this card into another player's draw pile, it costs [blue]0[/blue]
MULTIMADNESS-MALWARE.title: Malware
MULTIMADNESS-TREACHERY.description: At the end of your turn, gain {AmountGiven} [gold]Strength[/gold] then deal {AllyDamage} damage to all ALLIES.
MULTIMADNESS-TREACHERY.title: Treachery
MULTIMADNESS-DISTRIBUTED_COMPUTING.title: Distributed Computing
MULTIMADNESS-COMPUTE.title: Compute
MULTIMADNESS-YOUVE_GOT_MAIL.title: You've Got Mail!
MULTIMADNESS-LUCIDITY.description: Whenever you take damage on your turn all allies gain {Multiplier:plural:that much|{Multiplier} times that much} [gold]Block[/gold]
MULTIMADNESS-LUCIDITY.title: Lucid
MULTIMADNESS-BLIND_FURY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Deal {AllyDamage} to all allies.
MULTIMADNESS-BLIND_FURY.title: Blind Fury
MULTIMADNESS-PASS.title: Pass
MULTIMADNESS-PASS.description: Choose a card in your hand [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and give a copy to another player.
MULTIMADNESS-COMPETITION.description:
At the end of each turn 
If you dealt the least damage,
gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold]
If you had the least [gold]Block[/gold],
gain 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold]
MULTIMADNESS-COMPETITION.title: Catch Up!
MULTIMADNESS-SPIKE.title: Spike
MULTIMADNESS-NEVER_AGAIN.title: Never Again
MULTIMADNESS-PACT_OF_NEGATION.descriptio: The next time another player plays a {IfUpgraded:show:card|Skill or Power}, negate it and play two copies of it for yourself.
MULTIMADNESS-PACT_OF_NEGATION.title: Pact Of Negation
MULTIMADNESS-TRANSFER_POWER.title: Transfer Power
MULTIMADNESS-PROTECT_ME_SQUIRE.title: Knight
MULTIMADNESS-TAXATION.description:
For every 2 [gold]Energy[/gold] gained by allies during their turns, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:
(Also applies to cards)|}
MULTIMADNESS-TAXATION.title: Taxation
MULTIMADNESS-HEROIC_SACRIFICE.title: Heroic Sacrifice
